Meet Your Bartender

Crafting moments,
one pour at a time

Hi, I'm Leo — founder of Leo Mixology Studio, specializing in premium cocktail craftsmanship built on years of professional bartending experience in a luxury hotel environment. I focus on precision pours, balanced flavors, and customized drink menus tailored to each event.

My goal is to elevate every occasion with refined hospitality and high-quality mixology — from intimate gatherings to weddings, corporate functions, and private celebrations across Greater Vancouver.

5+
Years Experience
SIR
Certified

What We Do

Crafted for every occasion

01
Full Bar Service

Professional setup and service of wine, beer, High Balls and spirits for your guests. We handle everything from setup to breakdown.

From CA$70/hr

02
Signature Cocktail Service

Elevate your event with custom signature cocktails, 2 classic cocktails plus all the specialty syrups and garnishes.

From CA$100/hr

03
Event Consultation

Not sure what you need? We'll help you plan the drink menu, estimate quantities, and tailor a package that fits your event and budget perfectly.

Complimentary

04
Mocktail & Non-Alcoholic

Inclusive bar service with creative non-alcoholic options so every guest feels catered to.

Enquire for pricing

Transparent Pricing

Two clear options

OPTION A
Standard Bar Service
CA$70/hr
  • Lead Bartender (Leo)
  • Wine, beer & High Ball service
  • Full bar setup & breakdown
  • Basic garnishes (Fresh Fruit Wedges)
  • Post-event cleanup
  • Travel within Greater Vancouver
  • All drinks supplied by client / venue
  • 2-hour minimum booking

Ideal for weddings, corporate events, and private parties where you want professional service without cocktail complexity.

OPTION B — RECOMMENDED
Signature Cocktail Service
CA$100/hr
  • Everything in Option A, plus:
  • 2 Classic Cocktails (e.g. Margarita, Negroni, Old Fashioned)
  • 1 Custom Signature Cocktail
  • Specialty syrups & garnishes
  • Full ingredient list provided
  • All spirits by client / venue
  • Additional cocktails: +CA$100 each

Perfect for weddings, engagement parties, and any event where you want to wow your guests with a memorable bar experience.

Optional add-ons to customise your package

Premium Garnish Upgrade
Fresh botanicals, artisan garnishes & specialty syrups.
+ CA$50
Glassware Rental
At actual rental cost + CA$200 pickup & return fee.
At cost + CA$200
Disposable Cups
Sourced and delivered on your behalf.
At cost + CA$50
Cooler Rental
Portable cooler(s) for chilling drinks on-site.
At cost + CA$50
Foldable Table Bar Setup
Clean, dressed foldable table as bar station. Perfect for casual venues.
CA$50 flat
Extended Hours
Beyond included hours, billed at your selected option rate.
CA$70–100/hr

How It Works

Simple from start to finish

1
Get in Touch

Share your event details and we'll send a tailored proposal within 24 hours.

2
Review & Book

Choose your package, confirm details, and secure your date with a 30% deposit.

3
We Prepare

Receive your drink ingredient list, we sort the garnishes, syrups, and equipment.

4
Enjoy Your Event

We arrive, set up, serve your guests, and handle cleanup. You just enjoy the party.

Good to Know

Payment
  • 30% deposit due upon booking confirmation
  • Balance due 14 days before the event
  • Accepted: e-Transfer & Cash
Cancellation
  • 30+ days before: full deposit refund
  • 14+ days before: deposit non-refundable
  • Within 7 days: full amount due
BC Liquor & Licensing

Leo holds a valid Serving It Right (SIR) certification. All alcohol must be sourced by the client or venue in compliance with BC liquor regulations.
